# Summary Results {.unnumbered}

::: {#tbl-panel layout-ncol="2"}
|     term      |  estimate  |   std.error    |   t-stat   |  p.value  |
|:-------------:|:----------:|:--------------:|:----------:|:---------:|
|  (Intercept)  | 0.7769044  |   0.0401094    | 19.369650  | 0.0000000 |
|  MethodDiff   | -0.0761671 |   0.0292917    | -2.600291  | 0.0116294 |
| Mean_TypeDiff | -0.1147540 |   0.0329532    | -3.482333  | 0.0009170 |
| DatabaseDiff  | -0.4922226 |   0.0292917    | -16.804145 | 0.0000000 |
|               |            | $R^2 = 0.8203$ |            |           |

: Atopic Dermatitis (Non-lesional skin) {#tbl-first}

|     term      |  estimate  |   std.error   |   t-stat    |  p.value  |
|:-------------:|:----------:|:-------------:|:-----------:|:---------:|
|  (Intercept)  | 0.8476218  |   0.0484682   | 17.4882011  | 0.0000000 |
|  MethodDiff   | 0.0094161  |   0.0353962   |  0.2660213  | 0.7911054 |
| Mean_TypeDiff | -0.1599802 |   0.0398207   | -4.0175144  | 0.0001616 |
| DatabaseDiff  | -0.5259947 |   0.0353962   | -14.8602135 | 0.0000000 |
|               |            | $R^2 = 0.787$ |             |           |

: Atopic Dermatitis (Lesional skin) {#tbl-second}

|     term      |  estimate  |   std.error    |   t-stat    |  p.value  |
|:-------------:|:----------:|:--------------:|:-----------:|:---------:|
|  (Intercept)  | 0.8388469  |   0.0560170    | 14.9748698  | 0.0000000 |
|  MethodDiff   | 0.0180279  |   0.0409090    |  0.4406824  | 0.6609757 |
| Mean_TypeDiff | -0.1812961 |   0.0460226    | -3.9392801  | 0.0002099 |
| DatabaseDiff  | -0.5253723 |   0.0409090    | -12.8424578 | 0.0000000 |
|               |            | $R^2 = 0.7371$ |             |           |

: Cardiomyopathy (Non-failing heart) {#tbl-third}

|     term      |  estimate  |   std.error    |   t-stat   |  p.value  |
|:-------------:|:----------:|:--------------:|:----------:|:---------:|
|  (Intercept)  | 0.8319698  |   0.0644514    | 12.9084809 | 0.0000000 |
|  MethodDiff   | 0.0201922  |   0.0470687    | 0.4289955  | 0.6694135 |
| Mean_TypeDiff | -0.2093239 |   0.0529522    | -3.9530699 | 0.0002005 |
| DatabaseDiff  | -0.4443095 |   0.0470687    | -9.4396047 | 0.0000000 |
|               |            | $R^2 = 0.6143$ |            |           |

: Cardiomyopathy (Hypertrophic) {#tbl-fourth}

Multiple linear regression summary table across all tested datasets
:::
